allow: Bash(mysql -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS sunaulo_care CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")
Bash(test -f "C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" && echo "XAMPP MySQL found" || echo "Not found" && ls "C:/xampp/mysql/bin/" | grep mysql)
Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS sunaulo_care CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; SHOW DATABASES;")
